top_stories.title: FailureMem: A Failure-Aware Multimodal Framework for Autonomous Software Repair
top_stories.summary: arXiv:2603.17826v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Multimodal Automated Program Repair (MAPR) extends traditional program repair by requiring models to jointly reason over source code, textual issue descriptions, and visual artifacts such as GUI screenshots. top_stories.title: OpenAI overhauls ChatGPT's model selection
top_stories.summary: OpenAI has redesigned how model selection works in ChatGPT. The article OpenAI overhauls ChatGPT's model selection appeared first on The Decoder.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

top_stories.title: Elevenlabs now lets you sell AI music you don't own
top_stories.summary: Elevenlabs has launched a marketplace for AI-generated music that pays creators when their tracks get downloaded or licensed. But who actually owns the music? A look at the terms of use tells the story: no one, really. The article Elevenlabs now lets you sell AI music you don't own appeared first on The Decoder.
top_stories.technical_takeaway: Adds empirical validation to approaches already used in production AI stacks.
top_stories.primary_risk: Risk of overfitting conclusions to narrow benchmarks.
top_stories.primary_opportunity: Practical improvements when layered onto existing AI workflows.

top_stories.title: Visa prepares payment systems for AI agent-initiated transactions
top_stories.summary: Payments rely on a simple model: a person decides to buy something, and a bank or card network processes the transaction. That model is starting to change as Visa tests how AI agents can initiate payments. New work in the banking sector suggests that, in some cases, software agents may soon take on that role.
